examples: She stood hesitating on the threshold.
Time is running short. Stop hesitating.
"I haven't asked anybody yet," said Mary, hesitating.
Under his leadership, Mr Blair said, Britain was no longer repeating its post-war pattern of hesitating on Europe.
By not hesitating to raise interest rates when inflation threatened, the bank's governor, Henrique Meirelles, has won investors' trust.
